ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the product */,
  "release_cycle" TEXT /* Typical release cycle (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the product (e.g., active, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the release belongs to */,
  "release_name" TEXT /* Name of the release (e.g., 3.1) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_type" TEXT /* Type of release (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was created */,
  "deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for the release */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who released it */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the release (e.g., planned, in progress, released, canceled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the history entry belongs to */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., status updated, priority changed) */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value after the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value before the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, QA engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role for which the permission is granted */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource to which the permission applies */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action that is allowed (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
